scores.notes: Company name severely garbled ('S.H.H. MOTOR' becomes 'Nut mie { Sl neIT )'). Address has errors ('Sungai Rengit' becomes 'Sungat Rangit'). Date incorrect ('23-01-2019' vs '73-01-2019'). Total amount 20.00 correctly extracted. OCR captured receipt format but with significant text corruption and structural issues.
